payload.body:
Agent implementation completed and the managed branch was pushed.

I’ll verify the exact shortcut code currently being served by the desktop/browser dev process before changing anything else. I’m using the in-app browser control workflow again because this is a live localhost interaction failure; I’ll also inspect the served Vite modules and running branch so we can distinguish stale code from an event-dispatch bug.The interactive browser connection is still unavailable, so I can’t synthesize the keypress in the page directly. I’m checking the live modules now; if they include the new chord code, I’ll trace the native `KeyboardEvent.metaKey` path. If they don’t, this is another branch/handoff mismatch rather than a shortcut implementation failure.I found the concrete cause: the running app is not serving the committed branch contents. Port 5173 is serving a stale, dirty filesystem copy that still registers `S` then `B` and whose shortcut registry explicitly rejects every `metaKey` event. The branch HEAD contains the newer `⌘B` implementation, but the checked-out runtime worktree was not refreshed when Cycle advanced the branch reference. I’m confirming the exact file divergence so I can give you the safest reconciliation command without touching that separate worktree.The `⌘B` code is correct in branch HEAD `1480f990b`, but the running worktree contains staged stale versions that restore `S` then `B` and reject all Command-key events. Vite is serving those stale files.

I can’t modify `/Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle` because the ticket explicitly restricts me to the attached worktree. From the running worktree, execute:

```bash
cd /Users/robertpitt/Projects/cycle

git restore --source=HEAD --staged --worktree -- \
  packages/desktop/ARCHITECTURE.md \
  packages/desktop/src/renderer/mutations/settings.ts \
  packages/desktop/src/renderer/screens/WorkspaceScreen.tsx \
  packages/desktop/src/renderer/shortcuts/ShortcutProvider.tsx \
  packages/desktop/test/settings-mutations.test.ts \
  packages/desktop/test/shortcut-registry.test.ts \
  packages/ui/src/organisms/app-shell/app-shell.tsx \
  packages/ui/test/component-regressions.test.ts
```

This only refreshes the stale ticket files and leaves the two unrelated untracked specification files untouched. Then refresh the browser or restart the desktop dev process. `⌘B` should work immediately.
